---
toc: false
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: jolla
  image: images/smoking.png
  image-width: 13em
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: Linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/emmeb/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/marco-bernardini/
---

:::{#hero-heading}

Hi, I’m Marco, a first-year MPhil student at the University of Oxford with a strong interest in mathematics, physics, and programming. Before Oxford, I worked as a data analytics lead at a major insurance company and as a project manager in IT consulting. Outside of data and models, you’ll usually find me in the erg room, in the mountains, or spending time with my two poodles, [Joyce](images/joyce.jpg) and [Leyla](images/leyla.jpg).

:::
